task.raw: Build a Chrome extension that asks before opening a site, with Actually no closing the tab, Escape triggering Actually no, 10 sec, 1 min, 5 min, decimal custom minutes, invalid custom-minute validation, same-origin reuse after allow, and close-on-expiry behavior.

fixture.name: public-site-gate-extension
notes: The replay copies the public Site Gate extension into an isolated temporary repo.
The accepted run executes manifest validation and the unpacked-extension CDP smoke.
The syntax-only run intentionally claims pass without browser-extension smoke and must reject.
